summary: Get Super Intel newsletter covering Meta's Watermelon LLM (Llama 5) matching GPT-5.5 performance, Zuckerberg's internal memo about slow AI agent progress, broader AI industry developments including robot-run facilities, AI political influence spending, and Fortune 500 AI adoption surveys.

articles.title: Meta's new AI model catches up to OpenAI's GPT-5, Zuckerberg says
articles.reason: Core story: Meta Watermelon/Llama 5 reaching GPT-5.5 parity. Directly relevant to wiki model coverage and competitive landscape.

articles.title: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven't progressed as quickly as he'd hoped
articles.reason: Major industry signal: Zuckerberg's internal assessment of AI agent progress. Directly relevant to AI agents concept page and Meta entity page.
